rule_metadata.name: Havex_Trojan_PHP_Server
rule_metadata.description: Detects the PHP server component of the Havex RAT
rule_metadata.author: Florian Roth

rules.rule_text:
rule Havex_Trojan_PHP_Server
{
	meta:
		description = "Detects the PHP server component of the Havex RAT"
		date = "2014-06-24"
		author = "Florian Roth"
		reference = "http://goo.gl/GO5mB1"

	strings:
		$s1 = "havex--></body></head>"
		$s2 = "ANSWERTAG_START"
		$s3 = "PATH_BLOCKFILE"

	condition:
		all of them
}
